hypothesis: A narrow opening range followed by a completed close beyond that range contains more persistent directional information than an intrabar first-touch opening-range breakout.

execution_contract.opening_range: High/low of the first contiguous range_bars in the declared cash session.
execution_contract.compression: Opening range width must be no greater than max_range_atr times ATR56 measured on the final completed opening bar.
execution_contract.confirmation: The completed signal bar close must be beyond the opening boundary plus breakout_buffer_atr times ATR56; a bar cannot confirm both directions.
execution_contract.entry: Next M15 bar open after the completed confirmation bar.
execution_contract.stop: Fixed stop_atr times the frozen ATR56 from the opening window.

selection_contract.preholdout_gate: DEV trades>=150 PF>=1.15 net>0; validation trades>=25 PF>=1.05 net>0; at least four positive development years
selection_contract.selection: One global family winner by the lower of development and validation PF, then development trade count.
selection_contract.holdout_gate: trades>=50 PF>=1.10 net>0 and both 2024 and 2025 positive

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
